<!-- kflow-pdf-float-barriers -->

\clearpage

# Figures

These example files are committed directly under `Figures/`. Replace an image
with the same filename to update it, or add a new image and section entry
together.

## Model region map

![Model regions used in the assessment.](Figures/region-map.png){#fig-region-map fig-align="center" width=100%}

```{=latex}
\FloatBarrier
\clearpage
```

## CPUE observed and fitted

![Observed and fitted CPUE. Points show observed index values and fitted lines show model predictions.](Figures/cpue-fits.png){#fig-cpue-fits fig-align="center" width=100%}

```{=latex}
\FloatBarrier
\clearpage
```

## Key quantities

![Key derived quantities, including depletion, recruitment, spawning potential, and fishing mortality trajectories.](Figures/key-quantities.png){#fig-key-quantities fig-align="center" width=100%}

```{=latex}
\FloatBarrier
\clearpage
```

## Length-frequency fit

![Observed and fitted length-frequency samples. Bars show observed sample counts and fitted overlays show model predictions.](Figures/length-frequency.png){#fig-length-frequency fig-align="center" width=100%}

```{=latex}
\FloatBarrier
\clearpage
```

## Kobe stock-status trajectory

![Kobe stock-status trajectory through time relative to biomass and fishing-intensity reference axes.](Figures/kobe-plot.png){#fig-kobe-plot fig-align="center" width=100%}
